creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Jeff fixed this in r254123 and it was merged back to stable/10 for 10.0-RELEASE. It hasn't been merged back to stable/9 though:

------------------------------------------------------------------------
r254123 | jeff | 2013-08-08 20:29:46 -0700 (Thu, 08 Aug 2013) | 6 lines

 - Fix compile errors from the clang conversion
 - Grab AF_SDP_INET from sys/socket.h

Submitted by:   Garrett Cooper
Sponsored by:   EMC / Isilon Storage Division
